statement: In every magma, Equation 3027 (`x = ((y * (z * w)) * x) * w`) implies Equation 55 (`x = x * (y * (y * x))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0137
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y (op z w)) x) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op x (op y (op y x)))
